items.title: Edit distance for eval scoring
items.scenario: Score a generated answer against a gold reference by Levenshtein distance for tolerant fuzzy match.
items.explanation: Classic O(m·n) DP. With m ≈ n ≈ 200 tokens that's 40k cells — fine; naïve recursion would explode.

items.title: Knapsack-style chunk packing
items.scenario: Pick the highest-value subset of context chunks that fits within an 8k-token prompt budget.
items.explanation: 0/1 knapsack with `value` = utility score and `weight` = token count → DP `dp[i][w]`, O(n·W). Greedy by value/weight is wrong in general.

items.title: Viterbi decoding
items.scenario: Find the most likely sequence of hidden states given a sequence of observations (HMM/CRF in classic NER or postprocessing).
items.explanation: DP over `(time × state)` lattice with `dp[t][s] = max_s' dp[t-1][s'] + log P(s|s') + log P(obs[t]|s)`.

items.title: RL value iteration
items.scenario: Compute the optimal value function for a small grid-world / dialog environment.
items.explanation: Bellman update `V[s] = max_a (R(s,a) + γ · Σ_{s'} P(s'|s,a) · V[s'])` is DP iterated until convergence.

items.title: Longest common subsequence for diff
items.scenario: Diff two model responses to compute a structural similarity score.
items.explanation: O(m·n) DP on LCS; the table also reconstructs the common subsequence by back-tracing.
